rationale: All four records describe the same project: M15 Select Bus Service on First and Second Avenues, Manhattan, from South Ferry to 125th Street (8.5 miles). Strong identity fields agree: project_type (Select Bus Service), corridor/limits, and route (M15). Differences are lifecycle moments captured by different documents (status: planning → proposed → design in progress → Phase I launch) and source/meeting suffixes (-2010, -cac3, -cb8-2010). Per project merge canon: "Records of the same project produced by different documents (community-board presentations, CAC meetings, dated copies) DO merge into the base project record" and "Distinct phases count as one project unless sources treat a phase as its own named undertaking." The name delta is abbreviation-only (SBS ↔ Select Bus Service). Decisive test: Same-object test (Test 2). Decisive identity field: project_name + corridor/limits + route_served (M15).
